# Adopting Organization-Safe Sidecar Policy

This sidecar is company-owned middleware for the generated output Z.

It intentionally does not modify the upstream technical-writer agent source A. The generated marketplace output Z includes:

- an agent file copied byte-for-byte from locked upstream source A;
- this sidecar policy file, which carries team-ready adaptation guidance.

## Adaptation guidance

- Preserve upstream provenance and locked refs.
- Treat this file as middleware policy, not upstream content.
- Use placeholders only; do not include real adopting-organization policy, private repositories, customer data, credentials, or production routes.
- When the sidecar conflicts with upstream guidance, escalate to a maintainer instead of silently rewriting source A.
